description: A plain candid close-up photograph (1200x900) of seized counterfeit designer handbags and wallets arranged on a surface, part of a CBP intellectual-property-rights seizure. The image shows a tight cluster of fake luxury goods: a Fendi-style bag printed 'FENDI ROMA', a Christian Dior 'CRIST DIOR'-monogram crossbody/messenger bag in gray, a black Yves Saint Laurent (YSL) envelope wallet with the interlocking YSL logo, brown Louis Vuitton monogram pouches and a gray LV Damier-check wallet, a Gucci-style bag with the signature red-and-green web stripe, and tan Louis Vuitton monogram luggage in the background, several with tags still attached. There is no added text, headline, logo overlay, or graphic design applied to the photograph; only the counterfeit brand markings appear naturally on the products. This is straightforward enforcement documentation accompanying the agency's anti-counterfeit holiday-shopping tweet, not a designed graphic or meme.
notable_text: (on-image brand text only: FENDI ROMA, CRIST DIOR, GUCCI, LV monogram) — no agency slogan on image
